prevalence.source: CSI/Heart Rhythm Society of India reports

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate due to stroke risk and hospitalization

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ECG with sawtooth flutter waves; rhythm monitoring when intermittent

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; ablation access limited

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: ECG access variable; Holter mostly in urban centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Rate control and anticoagulation; catheter ablation when available
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited EP labs and affordability barriers
